title: Native-style dialogue: workplace disagreement
subtitle: Disagree and find a compromise.
overview: This dialogue is more natural and less textbook-like.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: I do not see it clearly
we can look for a middle ground

items.es: No lo veo claro porque el plazo es muy corto.
items.en: I do not see it clearly because the deadline is very short.

items.es: Me preocupa que el equipo no tenga suficiente tiempo.
items.en: I am worried that the team does not have enough time.
We can look for a middle ground.

items.es: Probemos durante una semana y luego revisamos.
items.en: Let’s try for one week and then review.
That seems like a reasonable solution to me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.es: Creo que deberíamos cambiar todo el plan.
lines.en: I think we should change the whole plan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: No lo veo claro. Me preocupa que no tengamos tiempo.
lines.en: I do not see it clearly. I am worried that we do not have time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.es: Podemos probar un cambio pequeño durante una semana.
lines.en: We can try a small change for one week.
